name: TemStaPro
description: Binary classification for protein thermostability for temperature thresholds: 40, 45, 50, 55, 60, 65. Uses transfer learning from protein language model ProtT5-XL, outperforming existing pLM methods.
capabilities: Binary classification for protein thermostability for temperature thresholds: 40, 45, 50, 55, 60, 65
Uses transfer learning from protein language model ProtT5-XL, outperforming existing pLM methods

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence for thermostability binary classification

temperature_threshold.description: Temperature threshold in Celsius for thermostability classification
